subject: "one axis has an invalid range" on EMPIAR 10164
body:
Hi all,

I am trying to preprocess the first tilt series from the EMPIAR 10164 
dataset (frames) in warp. However, the results give defocus zero for each 
tilt and when I click on the Fourier representation I get an error message 
and warp crashes (settings and error message in attachment). Did someone 
encounter a similar problem?

Thanks for your help and best regards,
Stefano


Screenshots:

 [image: error_when_fourier_representation.png][image: 
settings_and_results.png]
